steps.name: Inbox page loads without crash
userSteps: Open browser → Go to /inbox URL

steps.name: Sidebar navigation visible
findings: Nav items: inbox, contacts, channels, calls, automation, marketing
userSteps: Look at the left sidebar → Confirm Inbox, Contacts, Channels links are shown

steps.name: Conversation list renders
userSteps: Open Inbox → Verify chat list appears with conversation rows

steps.name: Search bar present
userSteps: Look at top of inbox → Find the search input field

steps.name: Inbox top-bar controls visible
userSteps: Open Inbox → Check top bar for sort, filter, and control buttons

steps.name: Tab: "Unread"
userSteps: Open Inbox → Click the "Unread" tab at the top → Verify list updates

steps.name: Tab: "Assigned to Me"
userSteps: Open Inbox → Click the "Assigned to Me" tab at the top → Verify list updates

steps.name: Tab: "Unassigned"
userSteps: Open Inbox → Click the "Unassigned" tab at the top → Verify list updates

steps.name: Tab: "Individuals"
userSteps: Open Inbox → Click the "Individuals" tab at the top → Verify list updates

steps.name: Tab: "Groups"
userSteps: Open Inbox → Click the "Groups" tab at the top → Verify list updates

steps.name: Tab: "Archived"
userSteps: Open Inbox → Click the "Archived" tab at the top → Verify list updates

steps.name: Search bar focusable
userSteps: Open Inbox → Click on the search bar at the top

steps.name: Type query — list updates without crash
userSteps: Click search bar → Type a keyword → Verify conversation list filters in real-time

steps.name: Clear search restores full list
userSteps: Type in search bar → Press Escape or clear the text → Verify full list returns

steps.name: Team inbox switcher
userSteps: Open Inbox → Click team/inbox switcher at top left → Select a different inbox or team

steps.name: Sort order (newest / oldest)
userSteps: Open Inbox → Click sort icon → Choose "Newest" or "Oldest" → Verify list reorders

steps.name: Channel filter (WhatsApp / Facebook / etc.)
userSteps: Open Inbox → Click channel filter dropdown → Select WhatsApp or Facebook → List filters by channel

steps.name: Open filter panel
userSteps: Open Inbox → Click the filter/funnel icon → Filter panel slides open

steps.name: Assignee filter
userSteps: Open filter panel → Click "Assignee" dropdown → Pick an agent → List filters to that agent's chats

steps.name: Tags filter
userSteps: Open filter panel → Click "Tags" field → Select a tag → List shows only tagged conversations

steps.name: Date range filter
userSteps: Open filter panel → Click "Date range" → Pick start and end date → List filters by date

steps.name: Open first conversation
userSteps: See conversation list → Click any chat row → Conversation opens on the right

steps.name: Assign button opens agent picker
userSteps: Hover over a conversation row → Click "Assign" button → Agent picker dropdown opens → Select an agent

steps.name: More (⋯) menu shows actions
userSteps: Hover over a conversation row → Click ⋯ (More) icon → Menu shows Archive, Resolve, Snooze, Delete options

steps.name: Bulk select toggle
userSteps: Open Inbox → Click bulk select icon → Checkboxes appear on each conversation row → Select multiple

steps.name: Message thread renders inside conversation
findings: ⚠ Compose area not detected — check if conversation opened
userSteps: Click a conversation → Message bubbles load in the center panel

steps.name: Contact name / header visible
findings: ⚠ Resolve button not visible in header
userSteps: Open conversation → See contact name and Resolve button in the top header

steps.name: Message timestamps visible
findings: ⚠ No timestamps found in message view
userSteps: Open a conversation → Each message bubble shows the time it was sent (e.g. 10:30 am)

steps.name: Compose box is focusable
userSteps: Open conversation → Click the text area at the bottom → Cursor appears, ready to type

steps.name: Type text in compose
userSteps: Click compose box → Type a message → Text appears in the input without crash

steps.name: Send button visible and clickable
userSteps: Type a message → Click the Send (➤) button → Message is sent to the conversation

steps.name: Rich text toolbar (bold / italic / underline)
userSteps: Click compose box → See formatting toolbar → Click Bold (B) / Italic (I) / Underline (U) buttons → Text style changes

steps.name: Emoji picker opens
userSteps: Click the 😀 emoji icon in compose toolbar → Emoji picker grid opens → Click an emoji to insert it

steps.name: Attachment button (image / file upload)
userSteps: Click paperclip/attachment icon → File chooser or media panel opens → Select an image or file to attach

steps.name: Template / quick reply picker
userSteps: Click template icon or type / in compose → Template list opens → Select a template to fill compose box

steps.name: AI reply suggestion button
userSteps: Open conversation → Click AI/Copilot button → AI generates a reply suggestion → Review and send or edit

steps.name: Private / internal note toggle
userSteps: Open conversation → Click "Note" tab or toggle → Compose turns yellow/note mode → Type internal note → Send (visible only to agents)

steps.name: Scheduled send button
userSteps: Type a message → Click clock/schedule icon → Pick a date and time → Message will be sent at that time

steps.name: Channel selector (multi-channel)
userSteps: Open conversation → Click channel icon in compose → Select which channel (WhatsApp/Facebook) to send reply from

steps.name: Hover over message reveals action bar
findings: ⚠ Message action bar not detected (may need hover)
userSteps: Hover mouse over a message bubble → Action bar appears with React, Reply, Copy, Delete icons

steps.name: Emoji reaction on message
userSteps: Hover over a message → Click 😊 react icon → Emoji picker opens → Click emoji → Reaction appears under message

steps.name: Quote reply (reply to specific message)
userSteps: Hover over a message → Click Reply icon → Message is quoted in compose box → Type reply and send

steps.name: Copy message text
userSteps: Hover over a message → Click Copy icon → Message text is copied to clipboard

steps.name: Delete / unsend message
findings: Delete ref found: @e11 — not clicking to preserve data
userSteps: Hover over a message → Click Delete/Unsend → Confirm dialog → Message removed from conversation

steps.name: Resolve conversation button
userSteps: Open conversation → Click "Resolve" button in header → Conversation marked as resolved → Moves out of open inbox

steps.name: Assign to team member (from inside conversation)
findings: ⚠ Assign button not found inside conversation
userSteps: Open conversation → Click "Assign" in header → Pick a team member → Conversation is assigned to them

steps.name: Snooze conversation
userSteps: Open conversation → Click ⏰ Snooze → Pick time (1 hour / tomorrow / custom) → Conversation hides until then

steps.name: Pin conversation
userSteps: Open conversation → Click ⋯ More menu → Click "Pin" → Conversation pinned to top of inbox

steps.name: Mute conversation
userSteps: Open conversation → Click ⋯ More menu → Click "Mute" → No notifications from this chat

steps.name: Archive conversation
userSteps: Open conversation → Click ⋯ More menu → Click "Archive" → Conversation moves to Archived tab

steps.name: Mark as unread
userSteps: Open a conversation → Click ⋯ More menu → Click "Mark as unread" → Bold dot appears on conversation in list

steps.name: Delete conversation
userSteps: Open conversation → Click ⋯ More menu → Click "Delete" → Confirm → Chat is permanently removed

steps.name: Add label / tag to conversation
userSteps: Open conversation → Click label/tag icon → Pick a label from list → Label appears on conversation

steps.name: Contact panel visible or togglable
userSteps: Open conversation → Click contact/profile icon on right → Contact info panel slides in on the right side

steps.name: Contact name and phone visible in panel
userSteps: Open contact panel → See contact's name and phone number displayed

steps.name: Edit contact details
userSteps: Open contact panel → Click Edit (pencil icon) → Update name or phone → Save → Details updated

steps.name: Add custom attribute / field
userSteps: Open contact panel → Scroll to custom fields section → Click "+ Add" → Fill field name and value → Save

steps.name: Add / edit tags on contact
userSteps: Open contact panel → Find Tags field → Click to add tag → Type or select tag → Tag added to contact

steps.name: View conversation history list
userSteps: Open contact panel → Scroll to "Previous Conversations" section → See list of past chats with this contact

steps.name: CRM / notes section in contact panel
findings: ⚠ CRM/notes section not found in panel
userSteps: Open contact panel → Find Notes/CRM section → Click "Add note" → Type note → Save → Note appears in panel

steps.name: Sidebar collapse / expand
userSteps: Click the arrow/toggle icon at the edge of the sidebar → Sidebar collapses to icons only → Click again to expand

steps.name: Notifications bell
userSteps: Click the 🔔 bell icon in the top bar → Notification panel opens showing recent alerts

steps.name: Inbox settings navigation
userSteps: Click ⚙️ Settings icon in sidebar → Navigate to Settings page → Configure inbox preferences

steps.name: Getting started panel
userSteps: Click "Getting Started" link in sidebar → Onboarding checklist opens showing setup steps

steps.name: Analytics link from inbox
userSteps: Click Analytics in sidebar → Dashboard page loads showing message stats and charts

steps.name: Inbox initial load time
userSteps: Open browser → Navigate to /inbox → Measure time until page is interactive (target: under 3 seconds)

steps.name: Rapid filter tab switching — no crash
userSteps: Quickly click Unread → Assigned to Me → Unassigned → Individuals → Groups tabs in fast succession → App stays stable

steps.name: Repeated search queries — no crash
userSteps: Type "hello" in search → clear → type "test" → clear → repeat 4 times rapidly → No crash or freeze

steps.name: Back navigation from conversation
userSteps: Open a conversation → Press browser Back button → Returns to conversation list without crash
